title: stipa pennata var. pauneroana
intro: Stipa pennata var. pauneroana, a variety of the greater needlegrass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Stipa pennata var. pauneroana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
